title: Sampling Distribution and Approximations to Bias and Mean Square Error of Genotypic Correlation from Plant Breeding Data
abstract: The distributional behaviour using simulation and approximations to bias, mean square error of genotypic correlation when estimated from plant breeding data have been obtained and illustrated with field data from a yield trial on pearl millet. Empirical results have been discussed for the variation in several parameters.
publication: The Indian Journal of Genetics and Plant Breeding
